feat.name: Springboard
feat.requirement: Your previous action was a successful spinning talon Strike against an adjacent foe.
feat.text: You use the power of your leg lashing out to spring off your foe and leap toward another, your talon descending in a crescent. You Leap, which doesn't trigger reactions from the enemy you struck. If you land within melee reach of an enemy, you can choose to make a spinning talon Strike against them.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
